fields.Name: Per Minute
fields.Description: Time-based pricing billed per minute of session/audio time — the unit realtime voice and speech models (e.g. GPT-Realtime-Translate, GPT-Realtime-Whisper, conversational-agent platforms) publish their rates in. Cost rows using this unit express the price per ONE minute; consumers multiply by elapsed minutes (fractional minutes pro-rate).

fields.Name: Per Hour
fields.Description: Time-based pricing billed per hour — for hourly-billed model capacity (e.g. dedicated/provisioned realtime endpoints). Cost rows using this unit express the price per ONE hour; consumers pro-rate fractional hours.
